goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should 'arrive by 19:15'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
